item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 series deals: Save big on the brand's latest smartwatches
item.itunes:title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 series deals: Save big on the brand's latest smartwatches
item.itunes:author: XDA[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary:
While Samsung's Galaxy Watch 5 lineup from last year was very well received, many buyers expressed displeasure with Samsung's decision to remove the rotating bezel from the premium model. If you're also a fan of the rotating bezel on the Galaxy Watch 4 Classic, you'd be glad to know that Samsung has brought it back with its spiritual successor, the all-new Galaxy Watch 6 Classic. The latest smartwatches also pack a new Exynos W930 chipset, more RAM, larger displays, and bigger batteries, making them strong contenders for this year's best smartwatches.

If you're considering picking up a new Galaxy Watch 6 or Galaxy Watch 6 Classic, check out the following deals to save some cash on your purchase.

Best deals on Samsung's latest smartwatches

The all-new Galaxy Watch 6 and Watch 6 Classic come with minor upgrades over last year's models, but they're definitely worth picking up if you're still rocking a Galaxy Watch 4 or older. Thankfully, you don't have to pay full price for the smartwatches, as most retailers and carriers are offering attractive deals that will save you some cash on your purchase. Follow the links below to snag a great deal on the Galaxy Watch 6 or Watch 6 Classic.

Samsung Store

Samsung’s latest trade-in deals will get you up to $250 off your new Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 and Watch 6 Classic. You can also add the Galaxy Bude 2 Pro to your cart, and score $130 in instant savings, leaving it up for grabs at $100.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6
$240 $300 Save $60

There aren't any direct discounts through Samsung, but you can get up to $250 off with an eligible trade-in when you order a Galaxy Watch 6 through Samsung's store.

$240 at Samsung
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

Order the Galaxy Watch 6 Classic through Samsung's official store and get up to $250 off with an eligible trade-in.

$330 at Samsung

Best Buy

Best Buy will get you $70 and $60 savings on the Galaxy Watch 6 Classic and Watch 6, respectively. These instant savings will help you get your hands on Samsung’s best and latest smartwatch for as low as $240, but you can also choose to trade in a similar device to score up to $205 off. In other words, you can take a new Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 home for as low as $35.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6
$240 $300 Save $60

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 is receiving a very attractive $60 discount, but you can get an extra $205 discount when you trade in a similar device.

$240 at Best Buy
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic is now more affordable with a $70 price drop, and you can make that deal even more compelling by trading in one of your current devices.

$400 at Best Buy

Amazon

Amazon’s latest offers will get you 20 and 18 percent savings on Samsung’s latest smartwatches, with options starting at $239 for the 40mm version, and you can also get the higher-end Galaxy Watch 6 Classic for $90 more, as it currently goes for $329. Amazon won’t give extra savings with trade-ins, but you get the chance to get your new device with 18 monthly payments of $24 with Affirm.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6
$238 $300 Save $62

Savings make the Galaxy Watch 6 base model more compelling, as you can now take home the base model for just $239, which will get you more than $60 in instant savings.

$238 at Amazon
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

The Galaxy Watch 6 Classic is receiving a very attractive 18 percent discount, that will let you take one home for as little as $329.

$400 at Amazon

AT&T

AT&T offers new ways to save on your new Galaxy Watch 6, as you can now get yours for as low as $5/mo for 36 months. Of course, this also means you must purchase a qualifying Samsung smartphone to take advantage of this deal. And if you want the Galaxy Watch 6 Classic, get ready to pay $7 for 36 months if you pick up an eligible Samsung device.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6

Getting a new LTE variant of the Galaxy Watch 6 from AT&T is now more affordable, as you can get yours by paying as little as $5 each month.

$350 at AT&T
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

AT&T's latest offers will get you up to 50 percent off your new watch, but only after you purchase an eligible Samsung device to go with your Galaxy Watch 6.

$450 at AT&T

T-Mobile

T-Mobile’s latest offers will get you a new Samsung Galaxy Watch for free if you comply with some conditions. First, you will need to activate a new line on a qualifying wearable plan, giving you the total worth of your smartwatch via 24 monthly bill credits. And you can also buy one and get up to $350 off with a new line.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6

You can get your new Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 for free by activating a new line on a wearable plan, or get up to $350 off when buying a new device with a new line.

$350 at T-Mobile
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

While you can't get the new Galaxy Watch 6 Classic for free at T-Mobile, you can activate a new line and get $350 off via 24 monthly bill credits.

$450 at T-Mobile

Verizon

Grab the LTE variant of the Galaxy Watch 6 or Galaxy Watch 6 Classic through Verizon and get up to $180 off with an eligible trade-in. If you don't have an old device to trade, you can also grab the smartwatches for as little as $9.72 per month at a 0% APR.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6

Grab an LTE Galaxy Watch 6 through Verizon and get up to $180 off with an eligible trade-in. You can also get the smartwatch for monthly payments as low as $9.72.

$350 at Verizon
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

Get up to $180 off with an eligible trade-in when you order an LTE Galaxy Watch 6 Classic through Verizon. Alternatively, get it for as low as $12.39 per month for 36 months at a 0% APR.

$450 at Verizon

Save big on Samsung's latest smartwatches with these deals

Almost all retailers and carriers have impressive launch offers on Samsung's latest smartwatches, and you should make the most of them by ordering a new Galaxy Watch 6 or Watch 6 Classic from the links above. We've rounded up some of the best Galaxy Watch 6 cases and some impressive chargers you can use with the smartwatch, and you can use the extra cash to protect your new smartwatch or charge its style.

Of course, this also means you must purchase a qualifying Samsung smartphone to take advantage of this deal. And if you want the Galaxy Watch 6 Classic, get ready to pay $7 for 36 months if you pick up an eligible Samsung device.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6

Getting a new LTE variant of the Galaxy Watch 6 from AT&T is now more affordable, as you can get yours by paying as little as $5 each month.

$350 at AT&T
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

AT&T's latest offers will get you up to 50 percent off your new watch, but only after you purchase an eligible Samsung device to go with your Galaxy Watch 6.

$450 at AT&T

T-Mobile

T-Mobile’s latest offers will get you a new Samsung Galaxy Watch for free if you comply with some conditions. First, you will need to activate a new line on a qualifying wearable plan, giving you the total worth of your smartwatch via 24 monthly bill credits. And you can also buy one and get up to $350 off with a new line.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6

You can get your new Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 for free by activating a new line on a wearable plan, or get up to $350 off when buying a new device with a new line.

$350 at T-Mobile
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

While you can't get the new Galaxy Watch 6 Classic for free at T-Mobile, you can activate a new line and get $350 off via 24 monthly bill credits.

$450 at T-Mobile

Verizon

Grab the LTE variant of the Galaxy Watch 6 or Galaxy Watch 6 Classic through Verizon and get up to $180 off with an eligible trade-in. If you don't have an old device to trade, you can also grab the smartwatches for as little as $9.72 per month at a 0% APR.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6

Grab an LTE Galaxy Watch 6 through Verizon and get up to $180 off with an eligible trade-in. You can also get the smartwatch for monthly payments as low as $9.72.

$350 at Verizon
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

Get up to $180 off with an eligible trade-in when you order an LTE Galaxy Watch 6 Classic through Verizon. Alternatively, get it for as low as $12.39 per month for 36 months at a 0% APR.

$450 at Verizon

Save big on Samsung's latest smartwatches with these deals

Almost all retailers and carriers have impressive launch offers on Samsung's latest smartwatches, and you should make the most of them by ordering a new Galaxy Watch 6 or Watch 6 Classic from the links above. We've rounded up some of the best Galaxy Watch 6 cases and some impressive chargers you can use with the smartwatch, and you can use the extra cash to protect your new smartwatch or charge its style.
item.content:encoded:
While Samsung's Galaxy Watch 5 lineup from last year was very well received, many buyers expressed displeasure with Samsung's decision to remove the rotating bezel from the premium model. If you're also a fan of the rotating bezel on the Galaxy Watch 4 Classic, you'd be glad to know that Samsung has brought it back with its spiritual successor, the all-new Galaxy Watch 6 Classic. The latest smartwatches also pack a new Exynos W930 chipset, more RAM, larger displays, and bigger batteries, making them strong contenders for this year's best smartwatches.

If you're considering picking up a new Galaxy Watch 6 or Galaxy Watch 6 Classic, check out the following deals to save some cash on your purchase.

Best deals on Samsung's latest smartwatches

The all-new Galaxy Watch 6 and Watch 6 Classic come with minor upgrades over last year's models, but they're definitely worth picking up if you're still rocking a Galaxy Watch 4 or older. Thankfully, you don't have to pay full price for the smartwatches, as most retailers and carriers are offering attractive deals that will save you some cash on your purchase. Follow the links below to snag a great deal on the Galaxy Watch 6 or Watch 6 Classic.

Samsung Store

Samsung’s latest trade-in deals will get you up to $250 off your new Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 and Watch 6 Classic. You can also add the Galaxy Bude 2 Pro to your cart, and score $130 in instant savings, leaving it up for grabs at $100.

Samsung Galaxy Watch 6
$240 $300 Save $60

$240 at Samsung
Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic

Order the Galaxy Watch 6 Classic through Samsung's official store and get up to $250 off with an eligible trade-in.

$330 at Samsung

Best Buy

Best Buy will get you $70 and $60 savings on the Galaxy Watch 6 Classic and Watch 6, respectively. These instant savings will help you get your hands on Samsung’s best and latest smartwatch for as low as $240, but you can also choose to trade in a similar device to score up to $205 off. In other words, you can take a new Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 home for as low as $35.

$400 at Best Buy

Amazon won’t give extra savings with trade-ins, but you get the chance to get your new device with 18 monthly payments of $24 with Affirm.
